calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared with Robert Pullum, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Angela Pashayan, Don Pashayan or Telluride Flights, LLC.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 22, 2009.

Exhibit 1--2008 San Francisco Apartment Association
Residential Tenancy Agreement, dated May 19, 2008-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, Undated-----------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Robert Pullum, and against defendants Angela Pashayan, Don Pashayan and Telluride Flights, LLC as Jorge Marrufo, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $18,375.00.
Holdover Damages - $4,287.50.
Costs - $370.00.
Total - $23,032.50.

Additionally, plaintiff Robert Pullum is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 35 Tozaz Way, San Francisco, CA 94110. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Pullum is present.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Don Pashayan and Angela Pashayan are present.
Attorney, Timothy Moppin representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of OCT-05-2009 remains set.
